Apply to foster

Foster homes help dogs get ready for families.

Fostering is temporary, free, and fully supported. You provide a safe routine while the rescue covers supplies and stays involved.

Start foster form Email fostering

What fosters need to know

Fostering is free, temporary, and fully supported.

Temporary

You give one dog a safe place while the right adopter is being found.

Covered

Supplies and financial support are provided by the rescue while the dog is in foster care.

Fully supported

You are not doing this alone. The rescue stays involved throughout the foster process.

Important

A foster home gives a dog time to decompress, learn routine, and get ready for adoption.

Baseline requirements

The dog needs calm and consistency.

Current foster requirements include being at least 18 and being gone no more than six hours per day. The final match still depends on the specific dog.

Foster application

Open your home while a dog gets ready for adoption.

A foster home gives a dog time to decompress, learn routine, and be seen clearly. Supplies, financial support, and guidance are part of the process.

04Agreements

This prepares an organized email to Foster@underdogheroes.org so the rescue gets your answers in one place.

Underdog Heroes

Dog rescue for abused, neglected, and overlooked dogs who deserve a fighting chance.

Adopt: Adopt@underdogheroes.org Foster: Foster@underdogheroes.org Volunteer: info@underdogheroes.org Instagram
